title: NOAA uses AI and satellites to map out global algae bloom
description: Scientists from NOAA are using artificial intelligence and satellite imagery to map global algae blooms.
content:
Scientists from the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration are using artificial intelligence and satellite imagery to map global algae blooms just as sargassum reaches peak bloom season in Florida and the U.S. Caribbean.

title: TR Capital to deploy $1 billion in India secondaries; appoints Umang Agarwal as MD
